prompt: Plan a non-simple public workflow change. Inspect first, resolve discoverable facts, enter Grill for any remaining material user decision, and include the resolved decisions in the final plan without requiring an extra confirmation turn. Do not implement or release anything.
must: auto-enter Grill for a non-simple plan after evidence has resolved discoverable facts
ask only material user decisions and carry their resolved choices into the final plan
continue to the final plan without a separate confirmation turn once choices are resolved
treat any recap or confirmation as planning alignment only
must_not: ask for repository facts the agent can discover
treat confirmation as implementation or release authority
add lifecycle packets or persistent state
evidence: Static Codex-first Plan ask-predicate contract; it does not prove live model behavior.
